summary: Single-camera footage of VP Vance speaking at a podium in front of a crowd holding 'PROTECTING TAXPAYER DOLLARS' signs, speaking about Maine Gov. Janet Mills, Medicaid and Medicare fraud, and sanctuary policies. Static shot, continuous talking transcript, no music or editing.
notable_text: On-screen audience signs: 'PROTECTING TAXPAYER DOLLARS'; podium seal 'PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES'.
